reference: HERE BENSON ENTERED WITH THE CANDLES AND THERE FOLLOWED A BRIEF INTERVAL OF SILENCE I SITTING STILL IN MY CHAIR AND HE STANDING WITH HIS BACK TO THE FIRE SILENTLY TRIUMPHING IN MY DESPAIR
text: Here Basin entered the candles, and there followed a brief interval of silence. I was sitting still in my chair, and he is standing with his back to the fire, silently trying to think in my despair.
